feed.title: Meta Newsroom
feed.subtitle: Meta news, engineering, and AI blogs plus Meta developer changelogs and blogs -- in one feed.

entry.title: Build with Muse Spark, now available on Meta Model API
entry.content: Build with Muse Spark, now available on Meta Model API

entry.title: New Effects in Stories from Meta AI
entry.content: New Effects in Stories from Meta AI

entry.title: How to use Instagram Stories: The complete 2026 guide
entry.content: How to use Instagram Stories: The complete 2026 guide

entry.title: The wait is over: Build for display glasses starting today
entry.content: The wait is over: Build for display glasses starting today

entry.title: Modernizing the Meta Ads Service With an Open-Source Kernel Scheduler
entry.content: TL; DR At Meta’s scale, a few milliseconds of latency degradation can have a significant negative impact on ads performance. When a Linux kernel upgrade risked regressing latency across Meta’s ad serving fleet, we turned to sched_ext — the upstream, BPF-based extensible scheduling framework — to build a scheduling policy customized to the Ads delivery [...] Read More... The post Modernizing the Meta Ads Service With an Open-Source Kernel Scheduler appeared first on Engineering at Meta .

entry.title: Teachers and Local Businesses Win as Meta Expands Louisiana Data Center
entry.content: We're expanding our Richland Parish, Louisiana data center to 5GW of compute capacity in a town that’s already seeing life-changing returns for teachers, local businesses, and students. The post Teachers and Local Businesses Win as Meta Expands Louisiana Data Center appeared first on Meta Newsroom .

entry.title: Introducing Muse Spark 1.1
entry.content: Introducing Muse Spark 1.1

entry.title: Breaking Ground on Meta’s First Data Center in Canada
entry.content: We’re breaking ground on a new 1GW, AI-optimized data center in Sturgeon County, Alberta — our first data center in Canada and 33rd in our global fleet. The post Breaking Ground on Meta’s First Data Center in Canada appeared first on Meta Newsroom .

entry.title: Meta’s AI Glasses: Your Questions Answered
entry.content: We’re answering frequently asked questions about our AI glasses and sharing the features we’ve built to help both the wearers of our glasses and the people around them feel comfortable. The post Meta’s AI Glasses: Your Questions Answered appeared first on Meta Newsroom .

entry.title: Introducing Muse Image: Image Generation Built for Your World
entry.content: Muse Image is the first image generation model from Meta Superintelligence Labs, now available in Meta AI. The post Introducing Muse Image: Image Generation Built for Your World appeared first on Meta Newsroom .

entry.title: Our Work to Fight Child Exploitation on Our Apps
entry.content: Child exploitation is a horrific crime and every day, we work aggressively to fight this kind of abuse both on and off our platforms. We’re aware of recent news reports about Instagram ads in India that violated our policies against child exploitation. And we want to be clear: we take these concerns seriously, we never want this content on our platforms, and we’re committed to improving our efforts to combat it. Before these cases were brought to our attention, our enforcement systems had alr...

entry.title: Introducing Muse Image and Muse Video
entry.content: Introducing Muse Image and Muse Video

entry.title: July 3, 2026
entry.content: Documented geographic availability for the In-App Signup API, including the regions where it is not available.

entry.title: Boz to the Future: The Power of Innovation, Heresy, and Fighting for the Future with Palantir’s Shyam Sankar
entry.content: Welcome back to another episode of Boz to the Future. In the latest episode, Meta CTO Andrew Bosworth talks to Shyam Sankar — CTO of Palantir Technologies.

entry.title: Lock and Load: New Titles Join the Meta Horizon+ Catalog in July
entry.content: July adds Gun Club VR, Dragon Fist: VR Kung Fu and Phantom: Covert Ops to the Meta Horizon+ catalog.

entry.title: Meta’s AI Storage Blueprint at Scale
entry.content: Over the past several years, model capabilities and training dataset sizes have experienced exponential growth. During the past year or so, the time between new-frontier-model releases has gone down from months to weeks. Reliable and fast access to storage is important to both the speed and computational cost of this AI innovation. If AI is [...] Read More... The post Meta’s AI Storage Blueprint at Scale appeared first on Engineering at Meta .

entry.title: Elevate Your Golf Game with Meta AI Glasses, 18Birdies, and Arccos
entry.content: Together with Oakley, we’re integrating two apps into Meta AI glasses that golfers already trust and love to help take their game to the next level: 18Birdies and Arccos.

entry.title: What to Play on Meta Quest: June 2026 Recap
entry.content: We round up all the biggest new releases and content updates in June, to keep you up-to-date on what’s happening on Meta Quest and what’s pushing the envelope in VR

entry.title: Chat with Your Squad In-Game or Just Hang Out with Friends with Discord, Now Available on Meta Quest
entry.content: Today, Discord comes to Meta Quest, allowing you to talk with friends via text chat and voice in-headset — even while you’re playing games.

entry.title: 10 Years of Meta’s Commitment to Python
entry.content: This year marks Meta’s 10th consecutive year as a sponsor of the Python Software Foundation (PSF), the charitable organization dedicated to advancing, supporting, and protecting the open-source Python programming language and the community that sustains it. Python is one of the world’s most influential programming languages, and we use it across our engineering stack, from [...] Read More... The post 10 Years of Meta’s Commitment to Python appeared first on Engineering at Meta .

entry.title: June 30, 2026
entry.content: Added call recording and transcription for the WhatsApp Business Calling API.

entry.title: June 30, 2026
entry.content: Added the image grid template for Messenger Platform — send 2 to 6 images in a grid with optional per-image tap actions.

entry.title: It’s Time to Reserve Your WhatsApp Username
entry.content: We're launching usernames for WhatsApp, so you can connect with people without giving out your phone number. The post It’s Time to Reserve Your WhatsApp Username appeared first on Meta Newsroom .

entry.title: June 29, 2026
entry.content: Username reservation and adoption go live June 29, 2026; BSUID message-send support and the contact-request button move to July 2026.

entry.title: From Brain Waves to Words: Brain2Qwerty Offers a New Path to Communication Without Surgery
entry.content: From Brain Waves to Words: Brain2Qwerty Offers a New Path to Communication Without Surgery

entry.title: Inside One of Meta’s Data Centers
entry.content: See Tom Shaw's perspective on the infrastructure and technology inside one of Meta's data centers. The post Inside One of Meta’s Data Centers appeared first on Meta Newsroom .

entry.title: The Heat is On With Huge Savings in Our Peak Summer Sale!
entry.content: Summer is heating up, and so is your Meta Quest library, thanks to all the great new deals you can snag as part of our Peak Summer Sale.

entry.title: June 26, 2026
entry.content: Added SIP call webhooks support with call_created and terminate events for SIP-enabled numbers.

entry.title: Privacy-Aware Infrastructure in the AI-Native Era: An Asset Classification Case Study
entry.content: Privacy controls — systems that enforce retention, access, allowed-purpose, downstream-sharing, or anonymization policies — require a reliable understanding of data to function. Before such a control can operate effectively, it must know exactly what it is looking at. This can be complex, as demonstrated by a field simply named “age“: In one context, it might [...] Read More... The post Privacy-Aware Infrastructure in the AI-Native Era: An Asset Classification Case Study appeared first on Eng...

entry.title: Grammy Winner YUNGBLUD’s ‘Zombie’ Now Available in ‘Beat Saber’
entry.content: “Zombie,” YUNGBLUD’s deeply-personal exploration of grief, is Beat Saber’s latest Shock Drop, and it’s available to play today.

entry.title: Teens, Parents, and Educators Navigate Online Safety Through Real Conversations in Singapore
entry.content: We're launching an interactive experience in Singapore that gives teens, parents, and educators practical tools to have open conversations about online safety and digital wellbeing. The post Teens, Parents, and Educators Navigate Online Safety Through Real Conversations in Singapore appeared first on Meta Newsroom .

entry.title: June 25, 2026
entry.content: WhatsApp Cloud API Calling voicemail is now generally available.

entry.title: June 25, 2026
entry.content: Added Messenger Platform error code 10/1893063 for Pages temporarily restricted from sending messages.

entry.title: ‘VR Games Showcase’ June 2026 Recap: Every Meta Quest VR Game Announcement
entry.content: We’ve rounded up every Meta Quest game in the Summer VR Games Showcase to bring you up to speed on everything that’s coming to the Meta Horizon Store.

entry.title: How Meta Engineered Ultra-Narrow Batteries for AI Glasses
entry.content: Smart glasses like the Ray-Ban Meta and Oakley Meta Vanguards need to pack enough energy to power features like cameras, speakers, AI workloads, and even a display. But it all has to fit into the glasses’ temple arms. So how do you place a battery with enough power to run a pair of smart glasses [...] Read More... The post How Meta Engineered Ultra-Narrow Batteries for AI Glasses appeared first on Engineering at Meta .

entry.title: We’re Partnering With EssilorLuxottica to Launch Meta Glasses
entry.content: We're launching Meta Glasses with 26 styles across a range of colors, lenses, and frames, so there's a pair for just about any style. The post We’re Partnering With EssilorLuxottica to Launch Meta Glasses appeared first on Meta Newsroom .

entry.title: Launch of Meta’s Small Business Growth Academy Across Asia-Pacific to Boost AI Adoption and Digital Skills
entry.content: Meta's Small Business Growth Academy will provide practical AI tools, advertising, and cross-border growth training to help small businesses scale across Asia-Pacific. The post Launch of Meta’s Small Business Growth Academy Across Asia-Pacific to Boost AI Adoption and Digital Skills appeared first on Meta Newsroom .

entry.title: Introducing Meta Glasses: A Range of New Styles from Meta and EssilorLuxottica, Starting at $299
entry.content: Today, in partnership with EssilorLuxottica, we’re introducing Meta Glasses. Building on all the technology and features of the world’s best-selling AI glasses, this new line features bold and timeless shapes, rich colors, and premium materials, all consciously crafted and starting at just $299.

entry.title: Adopting AV1 for Real-Time Communication (RTC) at Scale
entry.content: Adopting AV1 for real-time communication at Meta has been a multi-year effort spanning codec selection, device eligibility, rate control, and error resilience. We’re sharing the technical and operational challenges while deploying AV1 and expanding coverage, and how we addressed them for real-time communication. We’re presenting several technologies for improving AV1 call quality, including rate control [...] Read More... The post Adopting AV1 for Real-Time Communication (RTC) at Scale appear...

entry.title: Instagram for TV Gets Bigger, With New Ways to Watch Together
entry.content: Instagram for TV will not be available on Samsung TV, plus we're testing new to make sharing and discovering even more fun. The post Instagram for TV Gets Bigger, With New Ways to Watch Together appeared first on Meta Newsroom .

entry.title: Instagram Platform — June 22, 2026
entry.content: AI Info Label POST /{ig_user_id}/media with the is_ai_generated parameter GET /{ig_media_id}?fields=is_ai_generated New Story Insights Metrics GET /{ig_media_id}/insights?metric=link_clicks

entry.title: Strengthening Teen Accounts with New Safety Updates on Instagram and Facebook
entry.content: Meta has announced a series of updates designed to strengthen protections for teens across Instagram, Facebook and Messenger. The post Strengthening Teen Accounts with New Safety Updates on Instagram and Facebook appeared first on Meta Newsroom .

entry.title: ‘VR Games Showcase’ Set to Show Off Big Upcoming Games on June 23
entry.content: Summer’s in full swing, and with a heap of new VR games on the horizon, it’s time for another VR Games Showcase to show off everything fans can look forward to coming to Meta Quest.

entry.title: Threads Returns to Türkiye With New Features
entry.content: This is because of a recent decision taken by the Turkish Competition Authority The post Threads Returns to Türkiye With New Features appeared first on Meta Newsroom .

entry.title: New Features to Celebrate 500 Million Monthly Users on Threads
entry.content: We're launching new communities features on Threads to celebrate reaching 500 million monthly active users. The post New Features to Celebrate 500 Million Monthly Users on Threads appeared first on Meta Newsroom .

entry.title: June 16, 2026
entry.content: Added messaging_account_id as the preferred Cloud API parameter, with paid_messaging_account_id kept as a deprecated backward-compatible alias.

entry.title: Iniciativas para manter pais brasileiros informados sobre as Contas de Adolescente e supervisão parental no Instagram
entry.content: Um dos principais objetivos do trabalho da Meta voltado à segurança dos adolescentes que utilizam nossos aplicativos é dar mais tranquilidade aos pais. Primeiro, com uma experiência desenvolvida especificamente para jovens de 13 a 17 anos que já tem configurações mais protegidas por padrão, sem que pais e responsáveis precisem fazer nada – as chamadas Contas de Adolescente; segundo, dando a esses pais informações úteis sobre como tem sido o uso de nossas plataformas por seus filhos. Assim, el...

entry.title: New AI Tools to Help You Make Things Happen on Facebook
entry.content: We’re introducing new AI-powered Facebook features to help you connect, create, and find what you’re looking for. The post New AI Tools to Help You Make Things Happen on Facebook appeared first on Meta Newsroom .

entry.title: June 15, 2026
entry.content: Added Direct Send API documentation for the open beta.

entry.title: Introducing Tokenless Access to Meta oEmbed APIs TL;DR You can now call Meta oEmbed APIs to embed public Facebook, Threads, and Instagram content without an access token. ... Read the story
entry.content: Introducing Tokenless Access to Meta oEmbed APIs TL;DR You can now call Meta oEmbed APIs to embed public Facebook, Threads, and Instagram content without an access token. ... Read the story

entry.title: The Future Is for Everyone: Free AI Glasses for Every Blind Veteran in America
entry.content: We're donating Ray-Ban Meta glasses to every blind veteran in America, giving them transformative AI technology. The post The Future Is for Everyone: Free AI Glasses for Every Blind Veteran in America appeared first on Meta Newsroom .

entry.title: June 12, 2026
entry.content: Documented business-side message edits and revokes in the coexistence edit and revoke messages webhooks for business-scoped user IDs.

entry.title: Going All in for Global Football Fans Across Meta Apps
entry.content: We’re bringing new football features and experiences to Threads, Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp, including athlete content, match content, and in-product activations. The post Going All in for Global Football Fans Across Meta Apps appeared first on Meta Newsroom .

entry.title: June 11, 2026
entry.content: Corrected the Terms of Service URL required in the In-App Signup API policy.tos field. Removed the United Kingdom from the unsupported regions for template analytics and template group analytics.

entry.title: Why Social Media Bans Alone Can’t Solve the Age Verification Dilemma
entry.content: To help ensure young people stay safe online, we need a practical, centralized framework that verifies the ages of people using our apps. The post Why Social Media Bans Alone Can’t Solve the Age Verification Dilemma appeared first on Meta Newsroom .

entry.title: Infrastructure Explained: Compute Power
entry.content: We're explaining what compute power is and how GPUs, CPUs, and MTIA custom silicon help us meet our AI innovation and computing needs. The post Infrastructure Explained: Compute Power appeared first on Meta Newsroom .

entry.title: June 10, 2026
entry.content: Documented the optional transfer_action request parameter and the new 147005 error code for the WhatsApp Business Username API.

entry.title: Meta Partners With Reliance on AI-Enabled Data Center in India
entry.content: Meta and Reliance Industries today announced a significant expansion of our strategic partnership with an agreement for an AI-enabled data center in India. The post Meta Partners With Reliance on AI-Enabled Data Center in India appeared first on Meta Newsroom .

entry.title: Meta Partners With Reliance on AI-Enabled Data Center in India
entry.content: We've enetered an agreement with Reliance Industries to lease our first ever AI-enabled data center in India. The post Meta Partners With Reliance on AI-Enabled Data Center in India appeared first on Meta Newsroom .

entry.title: Better Personalization and Changes to Controls for Your Activity From Other Businesses
entry.content: We're updating how we use information that other businesses already share with Meta. The post Better Personalization and Changes to Controls for Your Activity From Other Businesses appeared first on Meta Newsroom .

entry.title: America’s Workforce Academy: The Future Is for Everyone
entry.content: Meta is launching America’s Workforce Academy (AWA), nationwide a program designed to fast-track participants to long-term careers in skilled trades. The post America’s Workforce Academy: The Future Is for Everyone appeared first on Meta Newsroom .

entry.title: Meta Lab Brings Hands-On AI and VR Experiences to Best Buy Stores Nationwide
entry.content: We’re excited to bring the Meta Lab retail experience to Best Buy with over 50 dedicated experiential Meta Lab spaces launching soon inside of Best Buy locations across the United States and in Canada.

entry.title: Fighting Spyware: An Update From WhatsApp
entry.content: WhatsApp caught and disrupted spear phishing attempts linked to NSO, a spyware firm blacklisted by the US government. The post Fighting Spyware: An Update From WhatsApp appeared first on Meta Newsroom .

entry.title: Introducing Creator Assistant, Plus More Languages For AI Translations on Facebook
entry.content: Creator assistant understands each creator's unique presence and helps them take action to grow. The post Introducing Creator Assistant, Plus More Languages For AI Translations on Facebook appeared first on Meta Newsroom .

entry.title: June 4, 2026
entry.content: Clarified that deleting a business phone number is not supported via the API; use WhatsApp Manager.

entry.title: Reels Is Shaping India’s Video-First Future Across Gen Z, Women & Bharat
entry.content: Findings from new Meta-commissioned studies by IPSOS show that India’s video economy has become truly nationwide, with Reels emerging as the defining short-form video platform driving discovery, culture, creator engagement and commerce across Gen Z, women and Bharat audiences. The post Reels Is Shaping India’s Video-First Future Across Gen Z, Women & Bharat appeared first on Meta Newsroom .

entry.title: Leading Tech Companies and Law Enforcement Join Forces to Disrupt Criminal Scam Networks in Southeast Asia
entry.content: The operation was the first of its kind to include companies from across the industry in the fight to protect people from online scammers. The post Leading Tech Companies and Law Enforcement Join Forces to Disrupt Criminal Scam Networks in Southeast Asia appeared first on Meta Newsroom .

entry.title: Lights Out, Systems On: Validating Instant Power Loss Readiness
entry.content: We’re introducing Instantaneous PowerLoss Storm, a new testing paradigm within Meta’s infrastructure for handling and mitigating instant or zero-notice power loss in our data centers. We’re sharing: how we built readiness to tolerate instant failures into our existing systems with defense-in-depth strategies; tradeoffs made in implementing it, and how we validated our readiness. Disaster preparedness [...] Read More... The post Lights Out, Systems On: Validating Instant Power Loss Readiness a...

entry.title: Be There for Every Customer With Meta Business Agent
entry.content: Meta Business Agent is AI that lets every business show up for every customer, as if they had an infinite team behind them. The post Be There for Every Customer With Meta Business Agent appeared first on Meta Newsroom .

entry.title: June 3, 2026
entry.content: Added In-App Signup, a new guide for creating opt-in deep links that WhatsApp users click to subscribe to your messages.

entry.title: New 13+ Content Settings for Teen Accounts Expanding Globally on Instagram, Facebook, and Messenger
entry.content: Inspired by movie ratings criteria and parent feedback, this setting is designed to help teens see age-appropriate content by default. The post New 13+ Content Settings for Teen Accounts Expanding Globally on Instagram, Facebook, and Messenger appeared first on Meta Newsroom .

entry.title: June 2, 2026
entry.content: Published account model evolution docs; added Meta Business Agent section; updated About the WhatsApp Business Platform; updated the Message Templates API archive and unarchive response format.

entry.title: What to Play on Meta Quest: May 2026 Recap
entry.content: Each month, we round up all the biggest new releases and content updates so you can keep up with what’s happening on Meta Quest and what’s pushing the envelope in VR.

entry.title: New Games Join the Meta Horizon+ Catalog in June
entry.content: Rhythm, mystery, and a whole lot of personality — June’s Meta Horizon+ lineup has something for everyone.

entry.title: June 1, 2026
entry.content: Sticker API for Messenger Platform — browse, search, and send stickers, plus webhook sticker type support with 90-day transition.

entry.title: Instagram Platform — June 1, 2026
entry.content: Instagram Audio API GET /ig_audio?audio_type={music\|original_sound} — Search or retrieve trending audio GET /{ig_audio_id} — Get metadata for a specific audio asset GET /ig_audio?product=ADS&purpose=AUDIO_COPYRIGHT_REPLACEMENT&audio_replacement_mode={auto\|search\|default}&ig_media_id={ig_media_id} — Discover replacement audio for Reels ads New IG Media Field media_audio_type — The type of audio used in the media: MUSIC (licensed music from Meta’s catalog) or ORIGINAL_SOUND (original audio)....

entry.title: May 29, 2026
entry.content: Added documentation for voicemail collection and webhook delivery in the WhatsApp Cloud API Calling configuration (alpha).

entry.title: Take Flight and Explore the Unknown Skies of 'Compass,' Launching Today on Meta Quest
entry.content: ‘Compass’ is an open-world VR flying adventure from Montreal studio TREBUCHET, the team behind Broken Edge, Winds & Leaves, and Prison Boss VR.

entry.title: Protecting Players and Fans during FIFA World Cup 2026™
entry.content: We're sharing information about our efforts to combat scams and reduce abuse on our apps during the FIFA World Cup 2026™. The post Protecting Players and Fans during FIFA World Cup 2026™ appeared first on Meta Newsroom .

entry.title: Boz to the Future Episode 26: The Future According to Ed Catmull
entry.content: In this episode, Meta CTO Andrew Bosworth sits down with Ed Catmull, co-founder of Pixar, former president of Disney Animation, and one of the most influential figures in the history of computer graphics.

entry.title: ‘Beat Saber’ Celebrates Eight Years With Three Free Songs, Featuring a New In-House Track
entry.content: It’s time to cue the beat, lock into the rhythm, and slash notes to some heavy ‘Beat Saber’ tech-dance bass drops — with three free songs to play

entry.title: May 28, 2026
entry.content: Renamed contact request interactive message type, fixed parent BSUID endpoint URL, and added BSUID fields to calling API webhooks.

entry.title: May 27, 2026
entry.content: Added ISO 3166 Alpha-2 country codes column to the pricing country calling codes table.

entry.title: SilverTorch: Index as Model — A New Retrieval Paradigm for Recommendation Systems
entry.content: We’re introducing SilverTorch, a reimagining of recommendation systems that unifies all retrieval components for user generated content under a unified architecture. SilverTorch shows up to 23.7x higher throughput compared to the state-of-the-art approaches. It’s also showing 20.9x more compute cost efficiency compared to a CPU-based solution while also improving accuracy. Our research paper, “SilverTorch: A [...] Read More... The post SilverTorch: Index as Model — A New Retrieval Paradigm fo...

entry.title: May 26, 2026
entry.content: Quarterly pricing updates for July 1, 2026 rate cards, new WABA Currency Migration API page, and updated AI Providers and Calling API rate cards.

entry.title: Our AI Wearables Are “Changing the Game” for Disabled People
entry.content: We're rolling out new features on our AI glasses that make the technology more accessible to people with disabilities. The post Our AI Wearables Are “Changing the Game” for Disabled People appeared first on Meta Newsroom .

entry.title: From The Met to the World: Discover the Stories of Oceania in a New Virtual Exhibition
entry.content: For a year, The Metropolitan Museum of Art has featured 650 extraordinary artworks from across Oceania. Now, the ‘Oceania: A New Horizon of Space and Time’ experience — available on Meta Quest and desktop — is bringing the physical show’s spirit to anyone who can’t visit in person.

entry.title: May 18, 2026
entry.content: Added Reconnect offboarded coexistence clients guide. Covers automatic reonboarding when a coexistence client re-registers their WhatsApp Business app on a new device.

entry.title: Introducing Business AI on WhatsApp for Small Businesses in India
entry.content: To enable small businesses with AI-powered customer support directly into the WhatsApp Business app, we've launched Business AI in India. The post Introducing Business AI on WhatsApp for Small Businesses in India appeared first on Meta Newsroom .

entry.title: Instagram Platform — May 15, 2026
entry.content: oEmbed API

entry.title: Six Months of Meta Ray-Ban Display
entry.content: It’s been a little over six months since we launched Meta Ray-Ban Display — our most advanced AI glasses ever built — and it’s been awesome to see the response from our community.

entry.title: The Goo Goo Dolls Bring Their Iconic Sound to Meta Quest in a New VR Concert
entry.content: The Goo Goo Dolls have been rocking audiences for 40 years, but now you can see them on stage as you never thought possible on Meta Quest. The Goo Goo Dolls from the Beacon Theatre is an immersive concert that’s available for free on Horizon TV.

entry.title: Step into Summer: Save Big on Meta's Collection of AI Glasses
entry.content: Summer’s almost here and Meta’s AI glasses are on sale starting at just $224 for a limited time.

entry.title: May 14, 2026
entry.content: Mark messages as read now supports group messages. Each group message must be marked individually.

entry.title: From Scroll to Chat to Cart: Trends Reshaping How India Shops
entry.content: On the sidelines of the 2026 Meta Marketing Summit E-Commerce edition, we are sharing key trends shaping the future of shopping in India — from the rise of AI-powered discovery and video-first commerce to the growing role of conversational messaging in driving transactions. The post From Scroll to Chat to Cart: Trends Reshaping How India Shops appeared first on Meta Newsroom .

entry.title: Embedded signup v4: Upgrade to Meta’s streamlined, unified onboarding experience before the deadline on TL;DR: If you're a developer using embedded signup v2 or v3 to onboard businesses onto Meta's Bu
entry.content: Embedded signup v4: Upgrade to Meta’s streamlined, unified onboarding experience before the deadline on TL;DR: If you're a developer using embedded signup v2 or v3 to onboard businesses onto Meta's Bu

entry.title: Introducing Instants: A New Way to Share in the Moment
entry.content: Share authentic moments as they’re happening with your Close Friends or mutual followers with just a tap. The post Introducing Instants: A New Way to Share in the Moment appeared first on Meta Newsroom .

entry.title: Introducing a Completely Private Way to Chat With AI
entry.content: Incognito Chat lets you talk to Meta AI in a way that is invisible to anyone else. The post Introducing a Completely Private Way to Chat With AI appeared first on Meta Newsroom .

entry.title: Reel Friends: Building Social Discovery that Scales to Billions
entry.content: On its face the new Friend Bubbles feature looks simple enough. It highlights Reels your friends have watched and reacted to. But sometimes the features that seem the most straightforward require the deepest engineering work. On this episode of the Meta Tech Podcast, Pascal Hartig chats with Subasree and Joseph, two software engineers from the Facebook [...] Read More... The post Reel Friends: Building Social Discovery that Scales to Billions appeared first on Engineering at Meta .

entry.title: Celebrating African Cinema With the ‘Made by Africa, Loved by the World’ 2026 Campaign
entry.content: In celebration of Africa Day on May 25, Facebook has launched the sixth edition of its pan-African campaign, ‘Made by Africa, loved by the world: Where stories spark community.’ This year’s campaign shifts the spotlight to African cinema. The 2026 campaign features a five-part vodcast series profiling five internationally acclaimed actors and filmmakers from Nigeria and South Africa, hosted by leading African podcasters I Said What I Said (Nigeria) and Because We Said So (South Africa). “For...
